claim: The project's name shall be Hotam-Spec (display) and hotam-spec (kebab-case for the filesystem, repository, and Go module path suffix), closing M1.
why: M1 (package name) was OPEN since the framework's first incarnation as 'tensio'. The rename to Hotam-Spec aligns the project with its repository name and the user's chosen identity. Convention: 'Hotam-Spec' in prose (capitalized hyphen), 'hotam-spec' kebab-case for the filesystem and repository; the Go module path is github.com/PHPCraftdream/HotamSpec. (Historically a Python package 'hotam_spec' with a PyPI 'hotam-spec' distribution; the project is now a Go module.) Renames completed in three sequential passes (#89 package, #90 domain, #91 prose).
